🚨🚨| BREAKING: Manuel Ugarte has 𝐓𝐎𝐑𝐍 his 𝐀𝐍𝐓𝐄𝐑𝐈𝐎𝐑 𝐂𝐑𝐔𝐂𝐈𝐀𝐓𝐄 𝐋𝐈𝐆𝐀𝐌𝐄𝐍𝐓 (ACL) — MRI confirms the worst following defeat to Spain.

He is expected to be out with this injury is 6-9 months minimum.

[@RodriVazquez95] https://t.co/wox3MEaN0R

🚨🚨🎙️| Jürgen Klopp on Andoni Iraola:

“Andoni Iraola is a great coach as well, like Arne Slot is, but it has to click it has to click together for a long time and for that you need luck.” https://t.co/b68UwKgJu8

🚨🚨🎙️| Jurgen Klopp on Liverpool’s form last season:

“No idea [why]. I’m not close enough to judge that. I was super happy that they won the league in the year before and I have no idea what was wrong in the year after.” 

“Nobody was extremely happy with the season, that was obvious but they still qualified for the Champions League. That is a success then so you can go again and have a new manager.” 

[@ESPNUK]

🚨🚨🎙️| Harry Maguire on whether he would welcome Rashford back to Manchester United: 

"Yeah, of course, I have an amazing relationship with Marcus. He’s unstoppable on his day." 

[@StevenRailston] https://t.co/5LwWImeIVa

🗓️ 28th May 2026: Steve Clarke signed a new four-year contract as Scotland manager. 

🗓️ 28th June 2026: One month later, he 𝐒𝐓𝐄𝐏𝐏𝐄𝐃 𝐃𝐎𝐖𝐍 after Scotland were eliminated in the World Cup group stage. ❌ https://t.co/0nOt27BPaS
